# Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to common questions about our training programs and Linux/IT support services.

All FAQs

## Browse by Topic

What is Online Instructor-Led Training (ILT) at School of Freelancing? +

It's a live virtual classroom—not pre-recorded video—with real-time interaction from expert freelancers and hands-on practice, using Telegram for chat and voice calls during sessions.

What is the Guaranteed Minimum Income (GMI)\* program?+

A career assurance initiative guaranteeing a baseline freelance income to graduates who maintain full attendance and independently purchase required marketplace bids/connects.

What is Client Acquisition Service Development? +

A practical training phase where trainees build professional portfolios and optimize profiles to land high-paying marketplace jobs or direct international clients.

What is Credential Verification Support? +

It is a service where School of Freelancing directly confirms a trainee's technical skills and training credentials to any inquiring organization or client.

How are training prices and durations determined? +

Training prices and durations are not random; they are structured logically based on the complexity of the technical skill, the depth of the curriculum, and the nature of the training framework.

Can I pay in installments to join a training program? +

No, all training programs require full upfront payment prior to enrollment to secure dedicated mentor resources and efforts.

What kind of projects are used in the training pipeline? +

We exclusively use Free and Open-Source Software (FOSS) projects, ensuring students build transparent, publicly verifiable repositories on GitHub with zero licensing overhead.

When is a project eligible to be included in the training pipeline? +

A project is eligible only when it becomes a functional, secure, production-ready, and high-demand solution that matches active real-world client demands.

What technical support do you provide? +

We offer Linux server administration, cloud deployment, VoIP, DevOps, security, troubleshooting, and ongoing technical support for businesses worldwide.

Can you start technical support immediately? +

Yes, in most cases we can begin as soon as the project requirements are confirmed and confirmed by both parties.

Do you provide remote support? +

Yes. We provide secure remote support for servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications worldwide through secure channels.

How long does it take to complete a project? +

The timeline depends on the project's complexity. Small tasks can often be completed within hours. Complex infrastructure projects may take days or weeks.

Do you offer ongoing maintenance and support? +

Yes. We provide one-time fixes as well as monthly maintenance and support plans tailored to your business needs.

Can I pay in installments? +

No we don't offer any installments payment to join our training

What is the mode of Payment and How? +

For join training you will need to pay full payment before join training and for tech support you will need to pay milestones basis payment using Bank, Remitly, Wise & Crypto.
